codeReview.summary: Reviewed the fix feature transcript plus both diffs. The original failed feature introduced overlap trimming based on raw `InputItem` equality in `compose_replay_input_items`, which let preserve-all replay and durable resume collapse legitimate repeated generated items. This fix narrows overlap trimming to sequences anchored by stable replay identifiers (`id`/`call_id`), explicitly excludes message/text items from that dedupe path, and adds focused regressions in both replay composition and `RunState::resume_input()`. The updated behavior preserves repeated generated items while still retaining the filtered-history overlap removal needed by the original multi-turn replay fix.

summary: Pass: reviewed the fix feature transcript and both diffs; the new overlap-keyed replay logic adequately resolves the prior scrutiny failure about repeated generated replay items being dropped by raw `InputItem` equality. No remaining issues found in scope.
